# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: sample-elasticsearch-pod
spec:
  containers:
    - image: kibana
      imagePullPolicy: Always
      name: elasticsearch-kibana
      ports:
        - containerPort: 5601
          protocol: TCP

      volumeMounts:
         - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch
            name: my-data
            readOnly: true
         - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch-7/plugins
            name: elasticsearch-plugins

          name: elasticsearch-volume
        - mountPath: /usr/share/kibana
          name: kibana-volume

  volumes:
    - hostPath:
       path: /tmp
       type: DirectoryOrCreate
      name: my-data

    - hostPath:
     path: /usr/share/elasticsearch
      name: kibana-volume

    - hostPath:
        path: /usr/share/elasticsearch-7/plugins
         name: elasticsearch-plugins
